curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff which modifies s3api/middlewares/body-reader.go in the wrapBodyReader function. The patch adds a nil check for the body reader obtained from the request context, replacing it with an empty buffer when nil to prevent panics. Sibling location s3api/middlewares/public-bucket.go (AuthorizePublicBucketAccess) identified because it directly sets the body reader from ctx.Request().BodyStream() without a nil check in the else branch for non-streaming payloads, exposing the same nil dereference vulnerability. Vulnerability class null-deref confirmed: CWE-476 matches and the patch clearly adds a nil pointer guard.
